chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 678 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.23265/2022 2. For hearing of main case 29.05.2025 Ms. Sara Kanwal advocate for the petitioner along with Mr. Muhammad Shahid Mohal, advocate Mr. Iftikhar Ahmed, advocate for respondent Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Per learned counsel for the petitioner the relevant application will be moved before the respondent No.3 who may decide the same expeditiously after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
